demo.title: darksol-oracle.sh
demo.code:
# Coin flip — $0.05 USDC or free for DARKSOL holders
curl "https://acp.darksol.net/oracle/random/coin"

# Roll 3d20
curl "https://acp.darksol.net/oracle/random/dice?sides=20&count=3"

# Random integer in range
curl "https://acp.darksol.net/oracle/random/number?min=1&max=100"

# Pick a raffle winner from a list
bankr prompt "Use DARKSOL oracle to pick 1 winner from these 50 wallets: …"

# Health + pricing + free-access details
curl "https://acp.darksol.net/oracle/health"

setup: No install required — every endpoint is plain HTTP
Free access: hold ≥10,000,000 DARKSOL on Base, sign the access message, send `x-darksol-wallet` and `x-darksol-signature` headers
Paid access: any x402 client with USDC on Base — pay at HTTP 402 challenge and retry
Verify any roll: oracle contract `0x4d2f471ae67b129bAda9cfC6224f0343c5C8fB5D` on Base 8453
